title: The Static
description: A liminal backrooms mod with unsettlingly realistic lighting that makes you question why you installed it and possibly your life choices.
body:
# The Static

**A liminal backrooms mod with unsettlingly realistic lighting that makes you question why you installed it and possibly your life choices.**

---
![Visuals Preview 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1b2776cd2c2a4e454fe565c68035af998a82393_0.webp)
---

The Static is a horror-liminal mod that makes Minecraft feel like somewhere you were never supposed to end up. Built around a custom VHS post-processing pipeline and dynamic area lighting powered by [Veil](https://modrinth.com/mod/veil), it doesn't just look different — it feels wrong in exactly the right way.

Unlike most horror mods that rely on jump scares and entity spam, The Static focuses on **atmosphere**. The darkness is real. The lights flicker for a reason. The VHS grain isn't decoration — it's there for an immersive experience.

> *Still a work in progress, which is just a polite way of saying it may randomly look amazing or broken, so if you have any sugestions make sure to leave them on my github repo!*

---

## ✨ Features

### 📺 VHS Post-Processing
> A full custom shader pipeline applied to the final rendered frame — scanlines, lens distortion, chromatic aberration. Toggleable in-game with a keybind, and saves your preference between sessions.

### 🔦 Synced Area Lighting
> Flashlights cast real volumetric area light visible to **all players** on the server. No more invisible torches — if someone's holding a light, you'll see it.

### 🌑 Pitch Black Nights
> Nights are genuinely dark. Not "slightly harder to see" dark. Pitch black. Your gamma setting won't save you, only light will.
---

## 📥 Installation

1. Install **NeoForge 21.1.x** for Minecraft 1.21.1
2. Download and install **[Veil 3.4.0](https://modrinth.com/mod/veil)** — this is a required dependency
3. Place `staticmod.jar` into your `mods` folder
4. Launch the game

**Not sure if it's working?** 
> Press `V` in-game (default keybind) to toggle the VHS effect on and off. If the screen changes, you're good.

---

## 🗺️ Roadmap

The mod is actively in development. Here's what's coming:

- **Level 0 dimension** — procedurally generated rooms using jigsaw structures, yellow wallpaper, wet carpet, the works
- **Ambient sound design** — fluorescent hum, distant footsteps, doors closing somewhere you can't see
- **More liminal blocks** — furniture, props, wall variants, ceiling tiles
- **Things that move when you aren't looking**
- **Making the mod work on more versions**
- **Better art**
- **etc...**

> My goal for this mod is to add as many levels as possible, all while all while keeping everything as close to the lore as I can.

---

## 🐛 Reporting Issues

Use the [GitHub issue tracker](https://github.com/Lxs0ff/TheStatic-1.21.1/issues) to report bugs and crashes. Please include:

- Your NeoForge and Veil version
- A description of what happened
- Anything you think might help solve the issue!

---
